---
title: "Dashboard"
---

# Sports Marketing Analytics Dashboard

This dashboard highlights marketing performance metrics, audience engagement trends, and campaign analytics related to sports marketing and digital media.

---

# Campaign Performance Overview

## Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Total Impressions | 245,000 |
| Engagement Rate | 8.4% |
| Click-Through Rate (CTR) | 3.1% |
| Conversion Rate | 2.4% |
| Followers Gained | 4,250 |

---

# Audience Engagement Trends

## Insights
- Engagement peaks during playoff games and rivalry matchups
- Video content generates the highest interaction rates
- Instagram and TikTok outperform other platforms for younger audiences

---

# Social Media Platform Performance

| Platform | Engagement Rate |
|---|---|
| Instagram | 9.8% |
| TikTok | 11.2% |
| X (Twitter) | 5.4% |
| Facebook | 4.1% |

---

# Fan Demographics

## Primary Audience
- Ages 18–34
- Sports fans interested in basketball and football
- Highly active on social media platforms

---

# Data Visualization Example

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

library(ggplot2)

platforms <- c("Instagram", "TikTok", "X", "Facebook")
engagement <- c(9.8, 11.2, 5.4, 4.1)

df <- data.frame(platforms, engagement)

ggplot(df, aes(x = platforms, y = engagement)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(
    title = "Social Media Engagement Rates",
    x = "Platform",
    y = "Engagement Rate (%)"
  )
```
